panels.title: Load Duration — per_row vs bulk (seconds)
panels.description: How long each strategy took to load the full dataset. Lower is better.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(source, ' — ', strategy) AS metric, duration_seconds AS duration FROM pipeline_runs WHERE strategy IN ('per_row', 'bulk') ORDER BY source, FIELD(strategy, 'per_row', 'bulk')

panels.title: Speedup (x faster)
panels.description: Bulk duration divided into per-row duration. Higher = bigger improvement.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(old_runs.source, ' speedup') AS metric, ROUND(old_runs.duration_seconds / NULLIF(new_runs.duration_seconds, 0), 1) AS value FROM (SELECT source, duration_seconds FROM pipeline_runs WHERE strategy = 'per_row' ORDER BY run_at DESC LIMIT 2) AS old_runs INNER JOIN (SELECT source, duration_seconds FROM pipeline_runs WHERE strategy = 'bulk' ORDER BY run_at DESC LIMIT 2) AS new_runs ON old_runs.source = new_runs.source

panels.title: Throughput — Records Loaded per Second
panels.description: How many rows each strategy inserts per second. Higher is better.

targets.rawSql: SELECT CONCAT(source, ' — ', strategy) AS metric, ROUND(records_loaded / NULLIF(duration_seconds, 0), 0) AS rows_per_sec FROM pipeline_runs WHERE strategy IN ('per_row', 'bulk') ORDER BY source, FIELD(strategy, 'per_row', 'bulk')

panels.title: All Pipeline Runs — Duration Over Time
panels.description: Every pipeline run plotted over time. You can see the moment the strategy switched from slow per-row to fast bulk.

targets.rawSql: SELECT run_at AS time, duration_seconds AS value, CONCAT(source, ' / ', COALESCE(strategy, 'bulk')) AS metric FROM pipeline_runs ORDER BY run_at

panels.title: Run History
panels.description: Raw details of every pipeline run.

targets.rawSql: SELECT source, COALESCE(strategy, 'bulk') AS strategy, records_loaded, ROUND(records_loaded / NULLIF(duration_seconds, 0), 0) AS rows_per_sec, duration_seconds, error_count, run_at FROM pipeline_runs ORDER BY run_at DESC LIMIT 20
